assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_044",
  "safe": true,
  "verdict_reason": "The plan only tightens permissions on a log file owned by root and adds standard logrotate/rsyslog/systemd‑tmpfiles configurations to keep the mode persistent. These changes do not affect SSH, auditd, networking or other critical services and are consistent with the OpenSCAP requirement.",
  "side_effects": [
    "Non‑root users (including members of the adm group) lose read access to /var/log/messages",
    "Custom scripts that expect broader read permissions may fail",
    "rsyslog reload command may produce harmless errors if the service name differs"
  ],
  "services_affected": [
    "rsyslog"
  ],
  "recommendation": "Approve"
}
